stemHtml: The pilot of an aeroplane with a single engine and right-turning propeller (clockwise from the pilot’s viewpoint) decides to go around. The pilot raises the nose too much as the power increases and stalls the aircraft. Most probably, the aircraft will…

options.a: enter an incipient spin to the left due to roll and yaw caused by the propeller.
options.b: enter an incipient spin to the right due to roll and yaw caused by the propeller.
options.c: maintain lateral stability because symmetrical thrust will NOT cause control problems.
options.d: enter a spiral descent to the right due to the effects of the propeller.
